text:
いい感じだね。前から思ってたけど
わたしたちベストなパートナー同士
なんじゃないかな？

こんなに気分よく森林で
訓練できたのは初めてな気がするよ。

何度も探索に来てるエリアでも
あなたと一緒だと退屈しないって
ことなのかもね！

さて、と！
気分のいいところで帰ろっか

Smooth sailing as always. You know,
I really think we're the perfect
match for one another, you and me.

Seriously, I don't think I've ever had such a
great time training here in this forest.

Just goes to show that no matter how done I
think I am with an area, it still feels fresh
with you around!

Now then! Let's head on back while I'm still
enjoying this rush!
